div#basic-box.box { width: 100 behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 80 easing: "linear" } } text { basic } } div#rebase-box.box { width: "100px" behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 140 easing: "easeInOutQuad" } } text { rebase } } div#disabled-box.box { width: "10vh" behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 100 running: false } } text { disabled } } div#percent-box.box { width: "50%" behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 60 } } text { percent } } div#vh-box.box { width: "50vh" behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 60 } } text { vh } } div#rem-box.box { width: "8rem" behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 60 } } text { rem } } q-component animated-panel { q-property panelWidth: "50%" behavior on panelWidth { NumberAnimation { duration: 60 easing: "linear" } } div.panel-fill { style { width: 50%; min-height: 1.5rem; background: #0f766e; color: #fff; } text { declared q-property percent } } onpanelWidthchanged(value) { this.querySelector(".panel-fill").style.width = value; } } animated-panel#panel-comp { }
